ndjson_body.line_2_warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

results.chat_behavior: Chat area completely empty, default state 'AI에게 질문하기' shown

console_errors.error_message: Expected stream response and got non-stream response.

diagnosis.root_cause: Etap sends NDJSON body as complete non-streaming response. Notion client expects ReadableStream (chunked/streaming delivery) and rejects non-stream responses.
diagnosis.ndjson_format_status: CORRECT — JSON Patch format matches #162 capture exactly
diagnosis.delivery_method_status: INCORRECT — Response delivered as single complete body, not as stream
diagnosis.connection_issue: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on subsequent API calls — Etap closing connections aggressively after block response
fix_needed: 1. Send NDJSON response as chunked/streaming (each line as separate HTTP/2 DATA frame with small delays between them)
2. Do NOT close the HTTP/2 connection after sending the block response — allow subsequent requests to use the same connection
3. Consider sending Transfer-Encoding: chunked (HTTP/1.1) or using proper HTTP/2 DATA frame streaming
